title: tectaria gemmifera
intro: Tectaria gemmifera, also known as the gemmed fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The gemmed fern is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Tectaria gemmifera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
